narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: टीसरा विश्व युद्ध जिद्ा छिडा तो दुनिया में तीए टुकडो उ बउउट जाइगी!
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text evokes fear of a potential third world war by stating that if the current conflict escalates, the world could be divided into three parts, and many countries would be involved in the war, leading to severe consequences.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: तीसरा विश्व युद्ध छिड़ा तो 3 टुकड़ों में बंट जाएगी दुनिया!
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text evokes fear and anxiety about the potential consequences of a third world war, suggesting that it could lead to the division of the world into three parts.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: जल्दी युद्धविराम न हो, तो दोनों देशों की आग पूरी दुनिया में फैल जाएगी और चाहे-अनचाहे हर कोई युद्ध का हिस्सा होगा.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text speculates about the potential outcomes of the war, suggesting that it could spread to the entire world and involve many countries.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: कोविड वैक्सीन का असमान बंटवारा भी बनेगा वजह
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text criticizes the Western countries, particularly the United States, for their handling of the COVID-19 vaccine distribution, implying that it has led to a lack of trust among weaker nations.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: टीसरा विश्व युद्ध जिद्ा छिडा तो दुनिया तीन टुकडों बंट जागी!
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text evokes fear of a potential third world war by stating that if the war between Russia and Ukraine escalates, it could lead to a global conflict, dividing the world into three parts.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: क्या वाकि दुनिया तीन टुकडों बंट जागी!
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text speculates about the potential outcomes of the war, including the possibility of a third world war and the division of the world into three parts.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: युनाउटेद नेशिंस की आवाज नहीं बचेगी
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text criticizes the Western countries and international diplomatic efforts, stating that the United Nations will not be able to maintain peace and that regional organizations will become more powerful.
